title: immunofluorescence analysis of CD31
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"duj0v","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"wpug9","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"61sGx","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":4846,"guid":"4107BFEF341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"primary antibody for CD31","mol_weight":0,"sku":"550300","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1503,"name":"Becton Dickinson (BD)","link":"https://www.bd.com/en-us","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":4847,"guid":"4107C041341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Goat anti-Mouse IgG1 Cross-Adsorbed Secondary Antibody, Alexa Fluor 488","mol_weight":0,"sku":"A21121","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1959,"name":"Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific","link":"https://www.thermofisher.com/in/en/home/brands/gibco.html","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Cut frozen muscle sections (5 mm) in a cryostat on microscope slides.
The slides were allowed to reach room temperature.
The slides were permeabilized with 0.3% Triton X-100-PBS for 10 min at 4°C.
A blocking solution of 5% normal goat serum (NGS)-PBS was applied for 1 h at room temperature.
Primary antibody (BD Pharmingen (cat. no. 550300; India)) in 1% NGS-PBS was applied at 4°C overnight.
Three consecutive washes with PBS for 5 min each.
Secondary antibody (Thermo Fisher (cat. no. A21121)) in 1% NGS-PBS was applied for 30 min at room temperature.
creator: Momoko Ogitani
